title: Intelligence Type Profile
promise: What type of intelligence do you have? A non-classical, multi-axis map of cognitive strengths — not an IQ test, no single score.
description: 20 self-rating tasks across eight intelligence types (Linguistic, Logical-Mathematical, Spatial, Musical, Bodily-Kinesthetic, Interpersonal, Intrapersonal, Naturalistic). Result shows an eight-axis radar with your top intelligences, venture contexts, and your learning style. Explicitly not an IQ test.
ogDescription: What type of intelligence do you have? 20 tasks, ~5 min. Private by design. Not an IQ test.
